phases.label: Stakeholder Interview
phases.description: Sit down with primary stakeholder, fill out template interview. Define goals, users, workflows, pain points.

phases.label: Workflow Assignment
phases.description: From interview output, define app screens, user workflows, data model. Internal planning step.

phases.label: Wireframe
phases.description: Create wireframe layouts for each screen. Low-fidelity, focused on structure and flow.

phases.label: Mockups Sent
phases.description: High-fidelity mockups sent to stakeholder for approval. Gate: requires stakeholder sign-off.

phases.label: Backend Build
phases.description: API endpoints, database schema, business logic, integrations. Heaviest development phase.

phases.label: Frontend Build
phases.description: React UI implementation. Components, forms, data display, interactions.

phases.label: Dev Release
phases.description: Deploy to development environment. Stakeholder gets first hands-on access.

phases.label: Testing & Iteration
phases.description: Stakeholder testing, bug reports, refinement cycles. Duration depends on feedback volume.

phases.label: Production Release
phases.description: Final deployment to production. Communication to users, monitoring.

phases.label: Stakeholder Interview
phases.description: Template interview with primary stakeholder. Define KPIs, data sources, audience.

phases.label: Page & KPI Planning
phases.description: Define number of pages, KPIs per page, data relationships. Submit to stakeholder for approval.

phases.label: Mockup Review
phases.description: Create and submit page layout mockups. Gate: requires stakeholder sign-off.

phases.label: Build
phases.description: Build report pages in Power BI against approved layouts and KPI register.

phases.label: Release
phases.description: Publish to Power BI workspace, configure refresh schedule, share with stakeholders.

phases.label: Report Review
phases.description: Review existing manual report with stakeholder. Understand data sources, layout, recipients, frequency.

phases.label: Report Build
phases.description: Recreate report using imperial-core Excel formatter. Match or improve on legacy layout.

phases.label: Report Approval
phases.description: Send sample report to stakeholder for sign-off on format and data accuracy.

phases.label: Notebook Build
phases.description: Create Fabric notebook to query data, generate report, and email via Graph. Schedule monthly trigger.

phases.label: Testing
phases.description: Stakeholder verifies a live test run. Confirm data, formatting, delivery, and schedule.

phases.label: Production Release
phases.description: Enable production schedule. Confirm first automated delivery.

defaultTasks.name: Product Validation
defaultTasks.description: Verify product catalog parity between legacy VMS and target system.

defaultTasks.name: Address Validation
defaultTasks.description: Validate all branch addresses through Google Places API.

defaultTasks.name: Single-Address Location Consolidation
defaultTasks.description: Consolidate multi-entry locations to a single validated address per site.

defaultTasks.name: Campus Target Identification
defaultTasks.description: Identify and implement campus-level targeting for multi-building locations.

defaultTasks.name: Account Billing Verification
defaultTasks.description: Validate account billing information against source system records.

defaultTasks.name: Commission Data Pull
defaultTasks.description: Extract and validate commission structures for branch accounts.

defaultTasks.name: Subsidy Data Pull
defaultTasks.description: Extract and validate subsidy arrangements for branch accounts.

defaultTasks.name: Workbook Planning
defaultTasks.description: Define workbook structure and transition plan for branch data migration.

defaultTasks.name: Initial Workbook Generation
defaultTasks.description: Create migration workbook with initial Orange sheet population.

defaultTasks.name: Account and Asset Lock
defaultTasks.description: Freeze account and asset data for final migration snapshot.

defaultTasks.name: Planogram Lock
defaultTasks.description: Freeze planogram configurations for final migration snapshot.
